description: CompositionGrey knit sleeveless sweater made of 100% cotton, has navy blue stripes in varying widths, navy ribbed armholes and mock neck with a zippered placket and ribbed hemline FittingComfortWash careWash in cold water using mild detergentDo not bleach, tumble dry or wringDry flat in shadeIron on lowDry cleanableThe navy blue stripes and ribbing add smooth styling to this grey knit sleeveless sweater from turtle. The cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day, while the fashionable cuts offer a flattering Fit. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with shirts or t-shirts and jeans.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
